name: The Sun
description: A massive ball of hot gas that provides light and energy to all planets

name: Mercury
description: The smallest planet and closest to the Sun with extreme temperature swings

name: Venus
description: The hottest planet with a thick atmosphere and bright appearance in the sky

name: Earth
description: Our home planet with liquid water and life as we know it

name: Mars
description: The red planet known for dust storms and potential signs of ancient water

name: Sirius
description: The brightest star in our night sky located in the constellation Canis Major

name: Betelgeuse
description: A massive red supergiant star and one of the largest known stars in space

name: Black Hole in M87
description: A supermassive black hole at the center of galaxy M87 first imaged by scientists

name: Sagittarius A*
description: The supermassive black hole at the center of our own Milky Way galaxy

name: TON 618
description: The largest known black hole in the universe with extreme gravitational power
